companies.name: Zumbach Electronic
companies.shortDescription:
Zumbach Electronics is an e-commerce company that provides industrial gauging, process control, and data acquisition technology solutions. || Zumbach Electronics is an e-commerce company that provides industrial gauging, process control, and data acquisition technology solutions. | ZUMBACH Electronic AG is a manufacturer of on-line measuring, monitoring and control systems. We are spe­cial­ized in non-con­tact meas­ur­ing tech­no­logy. | ZUMBACH ELECTRONICS is a world-leading manufacturer of in-line measuring systems for industrial applications. We provide the most accurate, reliable, and comprehensive industrial gauging, process control, and quality/production data acquisition technology. With our extensive process and industry knowledge, we offer cost-effective solutions that help manufacturers achieve operational excellence.

ZUMBACH instruments precisely measure diameter, ovality, wall thickness, concentricity, cross section, shape, capacitance, and more. Zumbach also provides fault detection systems, inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection systems, in-line profile monitoring systems, data acquisition, and FFT analysis.

Leading manufacturers around the world have integrated Zumbach systems into their processes to increase output, reduce material costs and downtime, improve safety, and control quality. Zumbach systems provide quality improvements in manufacturing through tighter tolerances, better transmission capabilities, and improved workflow

Zumbach’s leadership is built on its expertise in various technologies including lasers/optics, ultrasonic, x-ray, high-voltage technology, computer hardware and software, and more. Numerous international patents and trademarks demonstrate Zumbach’s strength in innovation. | ZUMBACH ELECTRONICS is a world-leading manufacturer of in-line measuring systems for industrial applications. We provide the most accurate, reliable, and comprehensive industrial gauging, process control, and quality/production data acquisition technology. With our extensive process and industry knowledge, we offer cost-effective solutions that help manufacturers achieve operational excellence. ZUMBACH instruments precisely measure diameter, ovality, wall thickness, concentricity, cross section, shape, capacitance, and more. Zumbach also provides fault detection systems, inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection systems, in-line profile monitoring systems, data acquisition, and FFT analysis. Leading manufacturers around the world have integrated Zumbach systems into their processes to increase output, reduce material costs and downtime, improve safety, and control quality. Zumbach systems provide quality improvements in manufacturing through tighter tolerances, better transmission capabilities, and improved workflow Zumbach’s leadership is built on its expertise in various technologies including lasers/optics, ultrasonic, x-ray, high-voltage technology, computer hardware and software, and more. Numerous international patents and trademarks demonstrate Zumbach’s strength in innovation. | ZUMBACH ELECTRONIC ist einer der führenden Hersteller von Online-Messsystemen für den in-dustriellen Einsatz. Wir liefern präzise, zuverlässige, innovative und maßgeschneiderte Produktlö-sungen. Unseren Fokus legen wir auf die Kundenzufriedenheit und die Bedürfnisse der verschie-denen Branchen.

ZUMBACH ist ein Schweizer Familienunternehmen das 1957 von Bruno Zumbach gegründet wurde und heute von seinem Sohn Rainer Zumbach geführt wird. Der Hauptsitz des Unternehmens be-findet sich in Orpund im Nordwesten der Schweiz. Weltweit gewährleisten kompetente Fachleute in 11 Tochtergesellschaften und mehr als 40 Vertretungen einen zuverlässigen Kundenservice.

Unsere Messlösungen garantieren unseren Kunden eine umfassende Qualitätssicherung, Pro-zessoptimierung und Protokollierung ihrer Produktion. Dank unserer langjährigeren Erfahrung und unserem Know-how können wir rentable und innovative Lösungen anbieten. Wir arbeiten nach hohen Qualitätsstandards und sind ISO 9001:2015 zertifiziert.

Führende Hersteller weltweit haben Zumbach-Systeme in ihre Prozesse integriert, um die Produk-tion zu steigern, Materialkosten und Stillstandszeit zu reduzieren, die Qualität zu verbessern und zu dokumentieren.

Unsere Technologien
•	Laser/Optik
•	Ultraschall
•	Röntgen
•	Induktion
•	Hochspannungstechnologie
•	Hard- und Software für Computer

Das schätzen unsere Kunden
•	Lange Gerätelebensdauer
•	Wartungsarmut
•	Zuverlässiger Kundenservice
•	Erfahrener Partner | Zumbach Electronics Corp. was founded in 1976. The Company's line of business includes the manufacturing of instruments used to measure electricity and electrical signals. | Heating Contractors | Electronics servicers & distributors | Nature of business:
ZUMBACH Electronics is one of the leading manufacturer of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire and cable industry (from wire drawing to fiber optics, including extrusion of insulation and jackets), for the plastics and rubber induiustry (mono filaments, catheter, tubing, pipe or profiles) and for the steel and metal industry (hot and cold rolling, continuous casting, turning, grinding, polishing to QC inspection stations).
ZUMBACH instruments measure diameter (Laser Micrometers), wall thickness and concentricity (ultrasonic or eddy current principle), and detect lumps/neckdowns (optical flaw detectors). Specialized sensors monitor the capacitance of data wires and coaxial cables. - Controllers with application specific algorithms shorten start-up times, minimize scrap production and material usage. Data acquisition and FFT analysis are offered as well. A line of inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection system, and in-line profile monitoring systems complete the ZUMBACH line of industrial precision equipment.
• BDO AG, Biel/Bienne | Founded in 1957, Zumbach Electronics is one of the leading manufacturers of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire, cable, plastics, rubber, steel and metals industries. The company has more than 50 employees and serves a wide range of industrial clients in the United States, Canada, Mexico and Central America. It is located in Mount Kisco, N.Y., and is a subsidiary of Zumbach Electronic AG, a privately owned company that provides in-line measurement systems based on various technologies, such as laser, ultrasonic and X-rays. The company s product line also includes preheaters for metal conductors and spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric components. It provides products of various brand names, including ODAC, ODEX, Cellmaster, Profilemaster, Simac, Metrex and UMAC.

companies.name: Kapsch
companies.shortDescription:
Kapsch TrafficCom AG supplies traffic systems and electronic fee collection systems. || Kapsch TrafficCom AG provides intelligent transportation systems technologies, solutions, and services in Austria, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia-Pacific, and the Americas. The company operates through two segments, Tolling and Traffic Management. It involved in the implementation, and technical and commercial operation of toll collection systems comprising individual road sections and nation-wide road networks; provision of toll services for business and private customers; and implementation and operation of systems and solutions for traffic control and mobility behavior, as well as related components business. The company offers tolling products, such as on-board unit, roadside radio frequency system, roadside video, vehicle enforcement, smart toll, operational backoffice, image processing suite, enforcement and commercial backoffice, and geo location platform; and traffic management products, including traffic control device, roadside unit, connected vehicle platform, connected mobility control center, mobility data platform, deep learning versatile platform, mobility management platform, and advanced traffic management system. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Vienna, Austria. Kapsch TrafficCom AG is a subsidiary of KAPSCH-Group Beteiligungs GmbH. | Kapsch TrafficCom AG supplies traffic systems and electronic fee collection systems. | K-Businesscom (formerly Kapsch BusinessCom) is Austria's ICT solutions and service provider, as well as a digitalization partner. | K-Businesscom serves as a consultant, service provider, and business engineer, assisting businesses on their way to digital transformation. In the following nations, the company blends an innovative corporate culture with technology skill and industrial knowledge. | Kapsch BusinessCom – ein Unternehmen der Kapsch Group – ist mit rund 1.300 Mitarbeitern und einem Umsatz von über 300 Millionen Euro einer der führenden ICT-Servicepartner in Österreich, Zentral- und Osteuropa. Eingebettet in die Kapsch Unternehmensgruppe agiert Kapsch BusinessCom weltweit mit eigenen Niederlassungen in Österreich und mit Gesellschaften in Tschechien, Slowakei, Ungarn, Rumänien und Polen.

Das Gesamtlösungsportfolio des Unternehmens deckt sowohl Informationstechnologie als auch Telekommunikation ab. Kapsch positioniert sich daher als ICT-Servicepartner. Neben der Systemintegration und der kontinuierlichen Optimierung übernimmt Kapsch BusinessCom in immer stärker werdendem Ausmaß auch den vollständigen Betrieb dieser ICT Lösungen.
Kapsch setzt dabei auf Herstellerunabhängigkeit und Partnerschaften mit weltweit technologisch führenden Anbietern wie Apple, Mitel, Avaya, Cisco, Google, Hitachi, HP oder Microsoft. Gemeinsam mit diesen Partnern agiert Kapsch als Berater, Systemlieferant und Dienstleistungsanbieter bei seinen 17.000 Kunden, vor allem aber als verlässlicher, vertrauenswürdiger und langfristiger Trusted Advisor in einem sich rasant verändernden technologischen Umfeld. | Kapsch Aktiengesellschaft was founded in 1892. companies.name: Averna
companies.shortDescription:
Averna is a premier manufacturing solution provider for communications and electronics device-makers worldwide, helping them deliver a better end-user customer experience. Key Averna clients in the communications, aerospace, defense, automotive, consumer electronics, and medical-device industries use Proligent, RF Test instruments, and other testsolutions to accelerate product development, reduce manufacturing costs, achieve superior quality throughout the lifecycle, and solve critical supply-chain issues.Averna has offices around the world as well as a network of partners such as JOT Automation, Keysight Technologies, and National Instruments. Incorporated in 1999, Averna is a Best in Test award winner and has been honored as one of the Deloitte Fast 500 fastest-growing technology companies in North America. || Averna is a premier manufacturing solution provider for communications and electronics device-makers worldwide, helping them deliver a better end-user customer experience. The Company offers a full range of test engineering services for every stage of the product lifecycle from product design through manufacturing and repair. | As a global Test & Quality Solution leader, Averna partners with product designers, developers and OEMs to help them achieve higher product quality and accelerate time to market. Founded in 1999, Averna offers specialized expertise and innovative test, vision inspection, precision assembly and automated solutions that deliver substantial technical, financial and market benefits for clients in the automotive and EV, life-science, battery, consumer electronics, industrial, telecom, transportation, and aerospace and defense industries. Averna has offices around the world, numerous certifications such as ISO, is ITAR registered and is partnered with NI, PI (Physik Instrumente), Eclipse Automation, Keysight Technologies and JOT Automation. | Averna is a premier test and quality solution provider for communications and electronics device makers worldwide. | Averna is a premier manufacturing solution provider for communications and electronics device-makers worldwide, helping them deliver a better end-user customer experience. Key Averna clients in the communications, aerospace, defense, automotive, consumer electronics, and medical-device industries use Proligent, RF Test instruments, and other test solutions to accelerate product development, reduce manufacturing costs, achieve superior quality throughout the lifecycle, and solve critical supply-chain issues.  Averna has offices around the world as well as a network of partners such as JOT Automation, Keysight Technologies, and National Instruments. Incorporated in 1999, Averna is a Best in Test award winner and has been honored as one of the Deloitte Fast 500 fastest-growing technology companies in North America. | Averna Technologies Inc was founded in 1999. The Company's line of business includes providing computer programming services. | Hi-tech testing, measuring and control systems
We build & install customer-specific hi-tech testing, measuring and control systems in a whole range of sectors | Computer Programming Services | Ontwikkelen, produceren en uitgeven van software | Engineers-Consulting | “Our clients are changing how the world works, travels and communicates. And we’re right there with them – demonstrating the full power and true potential of Test.” – François Rainville, President & CEO

As a global Test & Quality Solution leader, Averna partners with product designers, developers and OEMs to help them achieve higher product quality, accelerate time to market and protect their brands. Founded in 1999, Averna offers specialized expertise and innovative test, vision inspection, precision assembly and automated solutions that deliver substantial technical, financial and market benefits for clients in the automotive and EV, life-science, battery, consumer electronics, industrial, telecom, transportation, and aerospace and defense industries. Averna has offices around the world, numerous industry certifications such as ISO and is ITAR registered. 

Our everyday actions rest on 4 pillars representing Averna’s core values: teamwork and commitment, innovation and knowledge, performance and leadership and customer satisfaction. We offer:

• Our Services: We offer a full range of Test Engineering services and automated test equipment for every stage of the product lifecycle – from design and NPI through production and repair.

• Our Products: We put hard-earned expertise, technical innovation and extensive R&D into leading off-the-shelf test solutions that deliver substantial ROI and garner industry awards.

• Our Expertise: We help drive client success with our deep know-how in automation, RF, Design for Test, machine vision, battery test, broadband, NI TestStand/LabVIEW, FPGAs, fixturing, robotics, build-to-print, and more.

• Our Team: We are over 1200+ test engineers, system architects, hardware specialists, software developers, project managers and other professionals, including partners like NI, PI, Eclipse Automation, Keysight and JOT. | Averna Technologies Inc. provides test solutions for communications and electronics device-makers worldwide. It offers RF instruments and tools, such as RF records and playbacks, RF players and signal generators, multi-channel RF records and playbacks, multi-channel compact RF recorders, RF players for GNSS, and RF studio software. The company also provides test engineering, build-to-print, test support, and professional services. It serves aerospace and defense, automotive transportation, consumer electronic, life science, and telecom infrastructure industries. Averna Technologies Inc. was founded in 1999 and is based in Montreal, Canada with additional offices worldwide. It has sales, mark... | Test & Measurement Solutions SA provides testing and measurement services. The Company offers feasibility studies, consulting, engineering, vision inspection, condition monitoring, and precision assembly services. Test & Measurement Solutions conducts its business worldwide. | “Our clients are changing how the world works, travels and communicates. And we’re right there with them - demonstrating the full power and true potential of Test.” - André Gareau, Executive Chairman

Founded in 1999, Averna is a Test Engineering leader, delivering innovative test expertise and quality solutions for numerous clients in wide-ranging industries around the world. Our solutions facilitate brand protection, accelerate time to market, and reduce test costs.

• Our Services: We offer a full range of Test Engineering services and automated test equipment for every stage of the product lifecycle - from design and NPI through production and repair.

• Our Products: We put hard-earned expertise, technical innovation and extensive R&D into leading off-the-shelf test solutions that deliver substantial ROI and garner industry awards.

• Our Expertise: We help drive client success with our deep know-how in automation, RF, Design for Test,  GPS/GNSS, broadband, PXI, NI TestStand/LabVIEW, FPGAs, fixturing, robotics, build-to-print, and more.

• Our Clients: We place great value on our long-lasting partnerships with customers in sectors like aerospace, automotive, consumer electronics, defense, life sciences, telecom, and transportation.

• Our Team: We are test engineers, system architects, hardware specialists, software developers, project managers and other professionals, including partners like Keysight, JOT and National Instruments. | Averna is a full-service test engineering company that uses software, hardware and customized solutions. It works with various original equipment manufacturers. The privately owned company also provides on-demand engineering services. Founded in 1999, Averna maintains locations in Canada, Europe and Asia. It has a staff of more than 220 employees. In addition, the company serves clients in the telecommunications, automotive, aerospace and electronic industries. Averna has achieved ISO 9001:2000 certification. Its subsidiaries include DAQTron and Mindready Solutions. The company s Proligent is a test engineering platform that simplifies the design and maintenance of test systems. Averna also offers automated functional test and data acquisition systems.

companies.name: Imago Group Benelux
companies.shortDescription:
The Imago Group  is the largest channel for video communication in Europe, with a product offering that spans from video conferencing, cloud computing, digital signage, streaming, audio conferencing, IPTV, LCD displays, and interactive whiteboard technology. In addition to being the largest video-comunications equipment and infrastructure distributor in EMEA, the Imago Group Benelux works closely with several other notable vendors in order to provide our resellers with a complete solution that is tailored to their needs.
Our strategic vendor partnerships include; Avaya/Radvision, NEC, Samsung, Sony, eBeam, Revolabs, CBS, Unicol, Amino, Viewcast, Watchitoo and Chief. Imago also offer services from Deutsche Telekom and have strategic relationships with IBM and Microsoft.

Here are some reasons to partner with us:

• The Imago Group is represented in 8 countries around the globe. 

• Each country has access  to demo facilities, warehousing, sales and engineering services.

• Each account manager is a sales specialist, who has been highly trained enabling them to offer you the best advice.

•Impromp2u is our service division who offer Installation service and full pre/post sales support team.

• Our Group delivers unique marketing and sales programs and provide exceptional financial and technical support to accelerate the business of our partners
